executor_steps: Remove the entire annex agree block from Speed_Control (component type) because it contains illegal operations on opaque ports and unsupported operators
Create a new annex agree block in Speed_Control.Speed_Control_Impl (implementation) that declares e, e_dot, e_int as local real variables

In the implementation annex, use assign statements to compute e = (real)Target - (real)Actual only if AADL allows type coercion — otherwise, the requirement R1 must be implemented in a subcomponent with numeric ports
If type coercion is unsupported, add a numeric conversion subcomponent and move the entire control logic there, then update the model accordingly
